text: Dabana hi padta hai. Koi samajhne wala nahi hai. Husband bolte hain ki sab aurtein karti hain, tum naya kya kar rahi ho? Yeh sunkar mere poore badan mein ajeeb si suiyan chubhti hain, kyunki mera bhi ek wajood tha apna.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question connecting her physical sensation to her erased identity.
text: Tumhare wajood ko jab is tarah se andekha kiya jata hai aur sab aurton jaisa banne ko kaha jata hai, toh is chubhan ke alawa aur kya mehsoos hota hai andar hi andar?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai jaise mera gala kisi ne daba rakha hai. Har waqt bas suffocation. Rasoi mein khade khade achanak se rona aa jata hai, par aasu chupa leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the duration and hidden nature of her ongoing struggle in the kitchen.
text: Na jaane kitne waqt se tum rasoi ke in kaamon ke beech, apne is aansuon aur ghutan ko akele hi sambhale hue ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Waise toh do saal ho gaye meri job chhode hue. Tabse bas sabki zarooratein poori kar rahi hoon. Raat ko jab let-ti hoon, toh neend nahi aati, sochti hoon aage ki life aisi hi rahegi kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the duty constraint that has kept her awake with worry.
text: Do saal se lagataar dusron ki zarooraton ko aage rakhte hue, apne khud ke aage ke raaste ko soch kar yeh neend ud gayi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Main aisi nahi thi. Main apni conditions pe jeeti thi. Ab apni marzi se ek cup chai bhi nahi pee sakti. Yeh restrictions mujhe tod rahi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the isolation and trapped feeling stemming from her lost independence.
text: Lagta hai ki apni pehchaan aur azaadi khone ke baad, in pabandhiyon ne tumhe poori tarah se akela aur bebas kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere poore badan mein ajeeb si suiyan chubhti hain
text: Bebas hi toh hoon. Na wapas job pe jaa sakti hoon, na yahan khush hoon. Kisi se baat karo toh kehte hain 'ghar ki baat bahar mat nikalo'. Yeh chupaane ki koshish mein hi mere poore badan mein ajeeb si suiyan chubhti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her pain and isolation as a natural result of restrictive family norms, separating her worth from the situation.
text: Humare samaj mein aur joint families mein jahan aurton se chup rehne ki umeed ki jaati hai, wahan is tarah ki ghutan aur akelepan ka bojh uthana waqai bahut bhaari hai, aur tumhara yeh dard bilkul jayaz hai; isme tumhari koi galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe lagta tha main hi ungrateful hoon. Baki bahuein toh kitne aaram se adjust kar leti hain, toh main kyun aise react kar rahi hoon? Shayad isliye main pagalpan ki taraf jaa rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the feeling of going crazy by sharing a systemic anecdote about women losing their careers to joint family roles.
text: Apne career aur identity ko peeche chhodne wali bohot si working auraton ki life mein aisi sharirik ghutan aana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein 'adarsh bahu' ka thappa sabko banaye rakhna hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein... sab dikhawa hi karte honge shayad. Kisi ko apna dard dikhana allowed hi nahi hai. Par ab yeh dard itna badh gaya hai ki painkiller bhi kaam nahi kar rahi. Main andar se khatam ho rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect her fear of completely losing herself beneath the facade.
text: Dikhawa karte karte aur dard chupate hue, ab andar hi andar khatam ho jaane ka darr tumhe satane laga hai...

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, non-disruptive ways for her to reclaim tiny pockets of space.
text: Jab tum is ghutan se nikalna chahti ho, toh hum 2-3 choti cheezein try kar sakte hain jo tumhari daily routine mein fit ho jayein. Pehla, rasoi mein jab akele ho toh phone ke notes mein apne sachhe khayal likh lena, ya dusra, din mein 5 minute khud ke liye chhat par jaa kar gehri saans lena.

speaker: Seeker
